title: DOJ reveals photo in bid to jail accused would-be Trump assassin
shortDescription: The Justice Department isn't holding back in its bid to keep a man accused of attempting to assassinate President Donald Trump behind bars.

title: Supreme Court sides against Black voters
shortDescription: The Supreme Court struck down a Louisiana congressional map that may limit the power of the 1965 Voting Rights act.

title: Georgians can pay respects to Congressman David Scott at Capitol Friday
shortDescription: Atlanta congressman David Scott who died last week at the age of 80 will lie in state Friday at the Georgia Capitol following a memorial ceremony.

title: Supreme Court sides against Black voters in blow to landmark civil rights law
shortDescription: The racially and politically charged case – one of the biggest the court will decide this term − grew from a long battle over Louisiana’s congressional map.

title: FCC reviews ABC after Kimmel's Melania Trump joke
shortDescription: The FCC is reviewing ABC's broadcast licenses after a Jimmy Kimmel joke about Melania Trump sparked calls for action.

title: After trip to the moon, Artemis astronauts to take trip to White House
shortDescription: President Donald Trump will meet April 29 with the four Artemis II astronauts at the White House after their historic mission around the moon.

title: Trump's state dinner with King Charles III
shortDescription: President Donald Trump hosted the royals during a tense period in relations between the countries amid the Iran War.

title: Iran war has cost $25 billion, Pentagon official tells Congress
shortDescription: Pentagon chief Pete Hegseth testified before Congress for the first time since the U.S.-Israel war on Iran began in February.

title: Trump administration rule could cut federal benefits for disabled
shortDescription: The Trump administration is considering a rule that could cut federal benefits for up to 400,000 disabled adults and older people.

title: White House blames assassination attempt on anti-Trump rhetoric; Dems push back
shortDescription: The White House says a shooting at a press gala Trump attended is the 'predictable result' of Democratic rhetoric, prompting pushback from Democrats.

title: Inside Trump's globetrotting third-country removal program
shortDescription: A 43-year-old Cambodian man describes being sent by the United States to an Eswatini prison for over five months.

title: Mahan addresses how he plans to navigate his relationship with Trump.
shortDescription: San Jose Mayor Matt Mahan explains how he would navigate working with President Trump if elected California governor, as federal involvement in key state issues continues.

title: Special US passports to feature Trump portrait
shortDescription: A limited-edition U.S. passport will be released to commemorate America's 250th birthday. The inside cover features President Donald Trump's portrait.

title: Senate Republicans block measure to curb Trump's power to invade Cuba
shortDescription: Trump has been hinting at military action in Cuba, prompting anxiety among Democrats, who tried to block him with a war powers vote.

title: See pageantry and protocol at historic White House state dinner
shortDescription: President Donald Trump and First Lady Melania Trump hosted King Charles and Queen Camilla at the White House for a state dinner on April 28, 2026.
